sentence: 作家把手稿寄给了出版社。
pinyin: Zuòjiā bǎ shǒugǎo jì gěi le chūbǎnshè.
english: The author sent the manuscript to the publisher.

sentence: 他下载了一个开源软件包。
pinyin: Tā xiàzài le yī gè kāiyuán ruǎnjiànbāo.
english: He downloaded an open-source software package.

sentence: 这款传感器利用了光电效应。
pinyin: Zhè kuǎn chuángǎnqì lìyòng le guāngdiàn xiàoyìng.
english: This sensor makes use of the photoelectric effect.

sentence: 退休后他靠社会保障金生活。
pinyin: Tuìxiū hòu tā kào shèhuì bǎozhàng jīn shēnghuó.
english: After retirement, he lives on social security benefits.

sentence: 每届政府都会调整外交政策。
pinyin: Měi jiè zhèngfǔ dōu huì tiáozhěng wàijiāo zhèngcè.
english: Every administration adjusts its foreign policy.
